scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: "TOSIF"<sip:4008@[field2]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 INVITE Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Supported: replaces REQUIRE: replaces REFERRED-BY: <sip:+49691532218047@sip.pstnhub.microsoft.com:5061;user=phone> REPLACES: 8523166148cb9642b1a6362a6b986d59;from-tag=1;to-tag=1 Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1509186684 1 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP4 192.168.55.78 b=TIAS:64000 t=0 0 a=avf:avc=n prio=n a=csup:avf-v0 m=audio 41532 RTP/AVP 0 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=ptime:20 a=sendrecv
